name: Pizza Carcoifi
recipeIngredient: Tomatoes, peeled (1 pound) or canned tomatoes (16 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Tomato Topping: Chop fresh tomatoes if using. Heat oil in a medium saucepan. Add onion and garlic; cook until soft. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, and basil. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Cover pan and simmer for 30 minutes until thick.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
4. Spread the dough evenly with Tomato Topping.
5. Sprinkle cheese over the topping.
6. Drain artichokes, reserving oil. Drain tomatoes, then slice them.
7. Arrange sliced artichokes and tomato slices over the cheese.
8. Season everything with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Drizzle 1-2 tablespoons of reserved oil over the pizza.
10. Bake for 20 minutes until the crust is golden brown.
11. Garnish with parsley before serving.
